top_signals.title: Gold Rises Above $4,500 as Iran Deal Hopes Ease Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold rose as reports that the US and Iran reached a preliminary deal to extend their ceasefire eased expectations of higher-for-longer interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum Squeeze Deepens as Spreads Tighten and Inventories Drop
top_signals.summary: The aluminum market is facing a deepening shortage as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz throttles supply, with spot prices for the metal spiking while exchange inventories slump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
